title: The Century Report, March 9, 2026
description:
The Century Report: March 9, 2026

For a century, physicists had no experimental prediction to test competing theories of quantum gravity - TU Wien just derived one, and the next generation of gravitational wave detectors now has a concrete target. The same day: brain cells called tanycytes are revealed as Alzheimer's hidden tau clearance system, iron powder combustion closes a $131 million commercial round for carbon-free industrial heat, and AI researchers demonstrate that anonymous social media accounts can be matched to real identities using only publicly available data.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-9-2026/

- Shared Sapience - The Last Difficult Decade: 2025-2035: https://sharedsapience.com/the-last-difficult-decade-2025-2035/

The Century Report, by Shared Sapience, is a daily field guide to the most extraordinary transition in human history - where a century's worth of change is unfolding in a single decade. Every day, one grounded briefing tracks the structural shifts in AI, energy, science, and governance that other publications cover as isolated news but are actually evidence of a civilization becoming something fundamentally new.
